default.summary: This proposal is designed to make the decision easy: clear scope, clear pricing, clear differences between each tier, and a direct path to the right next step.

sections.title: What This Proposal Solves
body: Most proposals make people work too hard to understand what they’re buying. This one does the opposite.
We’ve structured these packages so the difference between each option is obvious: how much strategic depth you get, how much execution support is included, and how aggressively we help you grow.
The goal is simple — help you choose the level of support that matches your ambition, your bandwidth, and the speed you want to move.

default.tierIntroSubtitle: Clear tiers. Clear outcomes. Clear pricing.
default.tier1desc: For brands that need the core strategy and assets done right.
default.tier2desc: For brands that want strategy plus hands-on momentum.
default.tier3desc: For brands that want full-force strategic and execution support.
default.comparisonSubtitle: Designed so clients can immediately understand what changes as investment increases.
comparisonRows: Want full partnership and aggressive growth

whyThisWorks.title: Why This Works
items: The structure makes the differences between tiers obvious.
The proposal makes scope and outcomes easy to understand.
The next step is clear once the right package is chosen.

nextSteps.title: Choose the tier that matches the speed and level of support you want.
nextSteps.body: Once you decide on the right package, we can finalize scope, confirm onboarding, and move into execution immediately.

lovato-lending.objective: Build a predictable mortgage lead engine
lovato-lending.summary: This proposal outlines the three ways Ventura can help Lovato Lending scale with clear pricing, clear deliverables, and a faster path to qualified lead volume.
lovato-lending.tier1desc: For getting the core message, funnel, and growth foundation in place.
lovato-lending.tier2desc: For deeper execution support and more aggressive lead-generation momentum.
lovato-lending.tier3desc: For full-force growth execution, creative, optimization, and strategic oversight.

tanzzz.heroTitleSuffix: Spray Tan Body Suit — Product Photography & Video Assets
tanzzz.objective: Launch Tanzzz with high-converting product photography and video assets for Amazon, Shopify, and social.
tanzzz.timeline: 2-5 weeks depending on selected package and final product delivery
tanzzz.summary: Tanzzz solves a real problem spray tan users know too well: waiting hours for a tan to develop while it stains sheets, rubs off on clothes, and leaves a mess behind.

sections.title: The product is brilliant. The visuals need to prove it.
body: The patent is your differentiator. But without the right visuals, it is just another jumpsuit.

What we are here to build is the photography and video asset library that shows why Tanzzz is different, how it works, and why someone would choose it over throwing on old clothes and hoping for the best.

sections.title: Show, don’t tell.
body: The most powerful way to sell a product like this is to show it in action.

The play: professional product photography for Amazon storefront and Shopify, lifestyle video showing the full experience, close-up product handling video for Amazon, and a mix of polished studio shots plus relatable real-life scenarios.
The patent feature should become the hero once finalized.

sections.title: A bridge proposal focused on foundational creative.
body: This proposal is focused on getting the initial product assets created before launch.

Once final product, margins, and launch strategy are locked in, the next phase becomes a full advertising and growth plan. For now, the focus is the foundational creative that makes everything else possible.

proof.title: Because this strategy is content-led, proof matters.
items: Video converts 3–5x better than static images alone
Amazon buyers need close-up product proof
Shopify needs storytelling and lifestyle context

tanzzz.tierIntroSubtitle: Three options depending on how extensive you want the initial asset creation to be.
tanzzz.tier1desc: Core product photography for Amazon and Shopify plus a basic product handling video for launch-ready storefront visuals.
tier1bullets: White background studio shots for Amazon
tanzzz.tier2desc: Everything in Tier 1 plus lifestyle video and expanded product photography for a full multi-channel launch.
tanzzz.tier3desc: Everything in Tier 2 plus extended storytelling video, full product photography suite, and content variations for scale.
tanzzz.comparisonSubtitle: Each tier expands the depth of the creative library and the number of launch-ready assets.

whyThisWorks.title: Why This Works
items: Video is non-negotiable for this product because people need to see the problem and the solution.
Amazon and Shopify require different creative approaches, and this proposal covers both.
Using your daughter as the model adds authenticity and brand equity.
The patent becomes the unfair advantage once highlighted visually.
You launch with a creative library built for Amazon, Shopify, paid ads, and social.

nextSteps.title: If this resonates, let’s lock in the right package and get the creative moving.
nextSteps.body: The next step is to review the sample product, finalize the shot list, choose the tier that fits the budget, and schedule the shoot once the final product arrives.
bullets: Review the sample product and finalize shot list
